<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 05:57:39 PT

Found 0 violations across 13 files. All code adheres to dignified-python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - All control flow uses proper guards
✅ No default parameter values - All parameters explicitly required
✅ Keyword-only arguments - All functions with 2+ params properly marked with `*`
✅ Path operations - No `.resolve()` or `.is_relative_to()` without `.exists()` check
✅ Imports - All absolute imports, no re-exports detected
✅ Exception handling - Proper error boundaries at API level
✅ No silent exceptions - All exceptions properly handled
✅ Safe data access - LBYL patterns used throughout (`.get()` with defaults, None checks)

comments.body:
<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 05:58:12 PT

No tripwire violations detected. All code changes follow erk coding standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- **adding a new method to GitHub ABC** → loaded docs/learned/architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md
- **adding a new method to PlanDataProvider ABC** → loaded docs/learned/architecture/gateway-abc-implementation.md

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `subprocess\.run\(` - None found
✅ `\bimport time\b|time\.sleep\(|datetime\.now\(` - None found  
✅ `Path\.home\(\).*\.claude` - None found
✅ `\btry:|\bexcept\s` in fake/dry_run - None found

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ **5-place gateway implementation (GitHub ABC)** - Correctly implemented:
  - abc.py: Abstract method `get_issues_by_numbers_with_pr_linkages` defined (line 742)
  - real.py: Full implementation with GraphQL query building (line 2279)
  - fake.py: Filtering implementation on pre-configured data (line 1115)
  - dry_run.py: Delegates to wrapped (line 340)
  - printing.py: Delegates to wrapped (line 377)

✅ **3-place pattern (PlanDataProvider ABC)** - Correctly implemented:
  - abc.py: Abstract method `fetch_plans_by_ids` defined (line 126)
  - real.py: Implementation using GitHub gateway (line 431)
  - fake.py: Filtering implementation (line 189)

✅ **Test Coverage** - All new methods have comprehensive tests:
  - `test_build_issues_by_numbers_query_*` tests in test_real.py
  - `test_parse_issues_by_numbers_response_*` tests in test_real.py
  - `TestFetchPlansByIds` class in test_provider.py
  - `test_extract_plan_ids_from_roadmap_*` tests in test_objective_plans_screen.py

✅ **TUI helper function** - `_extract_plan_ids_from_roadmap` added with clear documentation

### Violations Summary
None found.

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/abc.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/dry_run.py`: 0 violations

- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/real.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/abc.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/fake.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/real.py`: 0 violations

- `tests/tui/screens/test_objective_plans_screen.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateways/github/test_real.py`: 0 violations

### Activity Log
